calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Authorizing Personal Representative To Continue Operating Decedent'S Unincorporated Business
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Authorizing Personal Representative To Continue Operating Decedent'S Unincorporated Business
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Continued To Dec-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Instructions Authorizing The Retention Of Litigation Counsel Relating To Lease For Decedent'S Unincorporated Business And Approving Retention Of Counsel To Negotiate Lease For Decedent'S Unincorporated Business
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Silva for Pamela Stutheit.

Mr. Silva stated that initially there was a problem with the liquor license, that the business is operating, that his Client comes to California twice a month and that she intends to sell the business within six months. In addition, Mr. Silva stated that they are in the process of re-negotiating a lease, that they will then sell, that the business produces a lot of cash and that the attachment to the order was requested by the bonding company. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administrator (subject to review of the order). Mr. Silva stated that there is a bond in the amount of $1,394,000.00.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
